header.announcement: Book a free consultation now and receive 1 complimentary skin care session
header.subtitle: Plastic Surgery Clinic

hero.body: GW Beauty pursues physician-led precision aesthetic medicine. From facial proportion and body contouring to skin regeneration — we deliver results that remain beautiful over time.

philosophy.body: Every face and body has its own architectural balance. GW Beauty's medical team respects anatomical proportions and long-term harmony, pursuing timeless refinement over fleeting trends.

face.label: Facial
face.title: Facial Refinement
face.description: We precisely analyze facial proportions and structure to create a harmonious impression while preserving natural expression and individuality.

body.label: Body
body.title: Sculpted Silhouette
body.description: We precisely correct body proportions to create a natural and balanced silhouette.

skin.label: Skin
skin.title: Regenerative Aesthetics
skin.description: Using the latest non-invasive technology to enhance the skin's natural regenerative capacity, restoring healthy and radiant skin.

banner.title: Your Beauty,
banner.body: GW Beauty's expert medical team proposes the optimal solution through personalized 1:1 consultation. Book your free consultation today.

doctors.title: Medical Board
doctors.subtitle: A multidisciplinary team uniting precision with patient-centered care

reviews.text: The proportions and balance are truly perfect. From consultation to recovery, I felt genuinely cared for at every step. It wasn't just surgery — it was a journey to regaining my confidence.
reviews.name: Kim O.H.

reviews.text: I had avoided photos for years. After eye surgery at GW Beauty, it was the first time I felt my face was beautiful. The results and the attentiveness of the medical team exceeded all expectations.
reviews.name: Park O.E.

reviews.text: I didn't want to look different — I just wanted my tired face to look vibrant again. GW Beauty understood exactly what I wished for and completed it naturally.
reviews.name: Lee O.J.

reviews.text: After liposuction, my body lines completely changed. There's no sign of surgery at all — it's so natural. The aftercare was thorough and attentive.
reviews.name: Choi O.A.

investment.title: Investment In
investment.subtitle: Transparent information · Tailored procedures · Outstanding results
investment.notice: ※ Procedure costs vary by individual condition and scope. Exact pricing is provided through a 1:1 consultation. In accordance with medical advertising regulations, price comparison advertising is not conducted.

consultation.title: Begin Your
consultation.subtitle: Book a private consultation with our expert medical team.
consultation.messagePlaceholder: Feel free to write any questions you have.
consultation.privacyRequired: [Required] I agree to the collection and use of personal information. Items: name, contact, inquiry / Retention: 1 year after consultation
consultation.marketingOptional: [Optional] I agree to the collection and use of personal information for marketing purposes. (Event & new treatment notifications)

consultation.privacyError: Please agree to the privacy policy.
consultation.phoneFallback: For urgent inquiries, you may also call us at

newsletter.body: Subscribe to be the first to receive the latest treatment information and exclusive event news. Subscriber-only benefits are also provided.
newsletter.privacy: You can unsubscribe at any time. Your personal information will not be used for purposes other than newsletter delivery.

about.heroBody: Meet the GW Beauty medical team, combining medical expertise with artistic sensibility. We create trusted beauty through patient-centered care.
about.tagline: A refined surgical philosophy that respects anatomical proportions and individual beauty
